title: Duplicate Board Feature for iOS Devices
excerpt: This feature would allow for the duplication of boards on Apple devices. Currently, there is no way to do this on the mobile app (including tablets), only on the desktop version.

posts.author: grace_nelson22 (Grace Nelson)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would allow for the duplication of boards on Apple devices. Currently, there is no way to do this on the mobile app (including tablets), only on the desktop version.
